title: TEST: Nessuna location corrisponde
description: backgroundImage assente, ambientazione che non esiste nel catalogo (il ponte di una nave in mare aperto): Gemma dovrebbe OMETTERE il tag, non forzare un id sbagliato.

scenes.narrativeText: The deck tilts hard beneath your boots as the ship crests another swell, spray stinging your face under a grey open sky. Sailors haul on rigging above you, shouting over the wind, with nothing but open water in every direction.

choices.choiceText: Climb toward the lookout for a better view

scenes.narrativeText: The horizon stays empty. The voyage continues without incident, for now.
